data.body: Implemented + independently reviewed. 4-layer deterministic-where-possible stack (structured.py): output_mode (NativeOutput/PromptedOutput, never forced-tool under thinking) + json-repair tolerant_parse (FIRST-object-wins, deterministic) + Pydantic normalizing validators (bounds in validators not schema) + bounded same-model retry feeding the error back. Wired live in _pai_structured; check_stop_reason guards refused/TRUNCATED turns (Anthropic + provider-agnostic finish_reason) BEFORE parse so json-repair can't fabricate from truncation. Second-interpreter LLM removed. Reviewer found AC gaps (stop_reason unwired, thinking-split, bounds only in toy model, recall-only eval, json-repair false-accepts) — ALL fixed+tested: stop_reason WIRED; real models get fail-safe verdict + confidence-clamp validators; eval gained a FALSE-ACCEPT arm; thinking flag reachable + two-step pattern documented; multi-object now first-wins. 444 tests pass, ruff clean. Commit b82d23f6.
